title: Converted: Night Sky
description: Structured text conversion of legacy contentData[103]. The original legacy slide remains available for comparison.

slides.title: Night Sky
slides.body:
Night sky
How much
can I open up
before you
stop shining?
I ask the moon.

How much of me
can I bring forth
and lay down
in the moonlight
before my darkness
devours your light?

In a fragile glimpse of trust
I walk into the night

with all my old songs
I don't dare to sing –

And the moon is shining.

The moon is shining.

- Hege Fridtun
